display_information.name: gc-oversight
display_information.description: Gas City oversight bot — bridges Slack DMs and rooms to gc sessions.
display_information.long_description: gc-oversight bridges human Slack conversations to Gas City multi-agent sessions. Operators DM the bot or @-mention it in a channel; the slack-pack adapter routes inbound messages to the bound gc session and posts session output back. Per-session display-name and avatar overrides use chat:write.customize so each bound session appears under its own identity. See https://github.com/gastownhall/gascity/tree/main/examples/slack-pack for setup.
